Class Slot

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Slot
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Slot extends Object implements Serializable
A single space on the TurnOrderTile. It carries the food bonus (or penalty) for landing there and tracks which totem, if any, currently occupies it.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Slot

      public Slot(int foodBonus, int positionIndex, boolean isLastSpace)
      Parameters:
      foodBonus - the food granted when a totem lands on this slot
      positionIndex - the 1-based position of this slot on the tile
      isLastSpace - whether this is the last (penalty) space

  • Method Details

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Returns:
      true if no totem occupies this slot

    • placeTotem

      public void placeTotem(Totem totem)
      Places a totem on this slot.
      Parameters:
      totem - the totem to place
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if totem is null
      IllegalStateException - if the slot is already occupied

    • removeTotem

      public void removeTotem()
      Removes the totem currently on this slot, if any.

    • getFoodBonus

      public int getFoodBonus()
      Returns:
      the food granted when a totem lands on this slot

    • isLastSpace

      public boolean isLastSpace()
      Returns:
      whether this is the last (penalty) space

    • getPositionIndex

      public int getPositionIndex()
      Returns:
      the 1-based position of this slot on the tile

    • getOccupiedBy

      public Totem getOccupiedBy()
      Returns:
      the totem occupying this slot, or null if empty
